visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins in an indoor room with four real people seated on blue chairs. A man in a brown shirt and suspenders sits in the center, flanked by three women. The background is a white wall decorated with various posters, magazine clippings, and a small fan. The lighting is bright and even, typical of an indoor studio. (2) The group is engaged in a game where the central man must answer questions incorrectly. When he fails or answers correctly, the women hit him with purple and orange foam sticks. This phase involves high-energy physical movement, exaggerated facial expressions of laughter and shock, and quick cuts showing different rounds of the game. (3) The scene transitions to a high-contrast cinematic product shot. A can of 'BLACK' black coffee is shown being poured into a transparent double-walled glass filled with ice cubes. Dark coffee liquid splashes over the ice, highlighting its texture and color. (4) The main man reappears, standing in front of the decorated wall, holding a coffee can and speaking directly to the camera. He performs various gestures, pointing at the can and drinking from it. His expressions are animated and enthusiastic. (5) The final phase shows the group of four together again, each holding a coffee can. They interact cheerfully, gesturing towards the product and smiling at the camera in a group endorsement setup.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Slogan]: POV：只能回答錯的答案. (2) [Subtitle]: 題目：早餐店點到的東西. (3) [Subtitle]: 大便！！. [Variety]: 答錯. [Logo]: hahababy. (4) [Subtitle]: 炒飯！！. (5) [Subtitle]: 題目：請說一個12生肖動物. (6) [Subtitle]: 貓！！. (7) [Subtitle]: 矮袋鼠！！. (8) [Subtitle]: 題目：說出一個hahababy的員工. (9) [Subtitle]: 蔡阿嘎！！. (10) [Subtitle]: 我們被併購了. (11) [Subtitle]: 還沒有消息出來. (12) [Subtitle]: 題目：提神的時候喝什麼. (13) [Subtitle]: 咖啡！！. (14) [Subtitle]: 怎麼想到都是咖啡啊. (15) [Slogan]: 每朝咖啡. (16) [Slogan]: 添加機能兒茶素與膳食纖維. (17) [Slogan]: 新陳代謝. (18) [Slogan]: 兒茶素+咖啡因 雙重助攻. (19) [Slogan]: 100% 哥倫比亞豆. (20) [Slogan]: 香氣濃郁. (21) [Slogan]: 口感醇厚. (22) [Slogan]: 限時3天 72小時. (23) [Slogan]: $499.

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A man with short brown hair wearing a dark brown oversized t-shirt with olive green suspenders and dark brown pleated trousers.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An indoor office or studio environment with white walls covered in various aesthetic posters and paper clippings. A floor lamp and a small electric fan are visible in some shots.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with loud, high-energy vocal interaction between multiple speakers. A male voice asks a question with high pitch variability, followed by an immediate 'Impact SFX' as foam sticks hit him. Laughter from female voices is audible in the background. (2) An upbeat, high-tempo electronic BGM kicks in with a strong percussive beat. The vocal delivery becomes faster as the game questions and answers are exchanged rapidly. Each incorrect answer is punctuated by a cartoonish 'Whoosh' or 'Pop SFX'. (3) A distinct 'Liquid Pour SFX' is heard, layered over a slight decrease in music volume, signaling a transition. (4) The male narrator's voice becomes more controlled and professional, adopting a narrative tone to describe the product features. His articulation is very clear. The BGM continues with a steady, energetic rhythm. (5) The video concludes with a group of voices cheering and laughing together, accompanied by a final musical flourish and a loud 'Stinger SFX'.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Gameplay -> Product Transition -> Promotion -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote 'Every Morning Coffee' (每朝咖啡) by using a humorous game show format as a hook to transition into a detailed product review and special offer.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of the product, detailed description of its ingredients and benefits, and a call to action with a specific discounted price.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video effectively blends entertainment with commerce. The fast-paced editing and humorous game keep the viewer engaged, while the clear product shots and feature lists ensure the commercial message is delivered effectively.
